name: Cyberpunk Edge
description: A high-contrast, neon-infused dark theme for ShokoServer Dashboard.
author: JC
css: .v-card { border: 1px solid #00f3ff !important; box-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(0, 243, 255, 0.15) !important; border-radius: 4px !important; transition: all 0.3s ease-in-out !important; } .v-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 0 15px rgba(255, 0, 255, 0.4) !important; border-color: #ff00ff !important; } .v-btn { text-transform: uppercase !important; letter-spacing: 1.5px !important; border-radius: 2px !important; } .text-h6, .text-subtitle-1 { text-shadow: 0 0 4px rgba(0, 243, 255, 0.4) !important; }
